snapshot.nutrition: Unclear — 'ig ok since i still have a flat stomach.' No strong signal either way.
snapshot.notes: Coming off 2 active days (16k + 10k steps). HRV dipped. Just tired.

readiness.reasoning: HRV -2.0 SD (LOW territory). RHR fine, no soreness, but energy flat and sleep insufficient. Lowest signal wins. Volume cut to 2 sets, RPE cap 7.

actual_exercises.name: Goblet Squat
actual_exercises.notes: Set 1 easy, set 2 a little challenging. Hold.

actual_exercises.name: Sumo Squat
actual_exercises.notes: PROGRESSED from 25 lb. Legs shaking on set 2. Lock in 30.

actual_exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
actual_exercises.notes: Good. Hold — grip is the limiter.

actual_exercises.name: Hip Thrust
actual_exercises.notes: PROGRESSED from 45 lb. Pretty easy. Lock in 50.

actual_exercises.name: Core Block
actual_exercises.notes: 2 full rounds. Hanging leg raises, knee raises, dead bug (felt good burn with stretch), plank hip dips, stomach vacuum. Lowkey easy but good burn.

strength.notes: Not tracked — forgot to start workout on watch. Gap 10:39-11:03 (~24 min).

core.notes: Peak HR 176 during core — higher than elliptical. Dead bugs/plank hip dips driving it.

flags: Trained fasted — got nauseous between RDL sets. Second day of vague eating.
Strength portion not tracked on Apple Watch.
notes: Reduced volume session (2 sets) per LOW-MOD readiness. Two progressions: sumo squat 25→30, hip thrust 45→50. Nausea from fasted training.
